scripts.typecheck: npm run build:config && npm run build:cloud && npm run build:utils && npm run build:policy && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:harness-driver && npm run build:harnesses && npm run build:fleet && cd packages/cli && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:rust && npm run build:core
scripts.build:core: npm run build:config && npm run build:cloud && npm run build:utils && npm run build:policy && npm run build:sdk && npm run build:harness-driver && npm run build:harnesses && npm run build:integration-prompts && npm run build:evals && npm run build:fleet && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:packages:watch: echo 'Package watch build was removed with the simplified core surface. Use package-specific watch commands instead.'
scripts.watch:start: npm run build && concurrently -k "npm run dev:watch" "node --watch packages/cli/dist/cli/index.js up"
scripts.predev: npm run clean && npm run build:packages && cd packages/cli && npx tsc && cd ../.. && chmod +x packages/cli/dist/cli/index.js
scripts.dev:local: npm run build && (cd packages/cli && npm link) && echo '✓ agent-relay linked globally'
scripts.dev:unlink: (cd packages/cli && npm unlink -g agent-relay) && echo '✓ agent-relay unlinked'
scripts.dev:rebuild: npm run build && echo '✓ Rebuilt (linked version updated)'
scripts.build:rust: if command -v ~/.cargo/bin/cargo >/dev/null 2>&1; then ~/.cargo/bin/cargo build --release --bin agent-relay-broker && echo '✓ broker binary (agent-relay-broker) built at target/release/agent-relay-broker'; else echo '⚠ Rust not installed, skipping local broker build; installs use platform optional dependencies'; fi
scripts.test:integration:broker: npx tsc -p tests/integration/broker/tsconfig.json && cd tests/integration/broker && node --test dist/*.test.js
scripts.eval:build: npm run build:sdk && npm run build:harness-driver && npx tsc -p tests/integration/broker/evals/tsconfig.json
scripts.eval: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js
scripts.eval:claude: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --harness=claude
scripts.eval:matrix: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --harness=claude,codex,gemini,grok
scripts.eval:lifecycle: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=10 --harness=claude
scripts.eval:lifecycle:free: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=10 --harness=opencode:mimo-v2.5-free,opencode:deepseek-v4-flash-free
scripts.eval:lifecycle:claude-models: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus
scripts.eval:phrasing: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=phrasing --repeat=5 --harness=claude
scripts.eval:phrasing:claude-models: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=phrasing --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus
scripts.eval:phrasing:non-claude: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=phrasing --repeat=5 --harness=codex,gemini,grok,cursor,droid,opencode:mimo-v2.5-free
scripts.eval:phrasing:all-harnesses: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=phrasing --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus,codex,gemini,grok,cursor,droid,opencode:mimo-v2.5-free
scripts.eval:auto-routing: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=auto-routing --repeat=5 --harness=claude
scripts.eval:auto-routing:claude-models: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=auto-routing --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus
scripts.eval:lead-delegation: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lead-delegation --repeat=5 --harness=claude
scripts.eval:lead-delegation:claude-models: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lead-delegation --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus
scripts.eval:lead-delegation:all-harnesses: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lead-delegation --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus,codex,gemini,grok,cursor,droid
scripts.eval:lead-quality: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lead-quality --repeat=5 --harness=claude:opus
scripts.eval:lead-quality:all-harnesses: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lead-quality --repeat=5 --harness=claude:opus,codex,gemini
scripts.eval:lifecycle:codex: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=codex
scripts.eval:lifecycle:gemini: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=gemini
scripts.eval:lifecycle:grok: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=grok
scripts.eval:lifecycle:cursor: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=cursor
scripts.eval:lifecycle:droid: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=droid
scripts.eval:lifecycle:all-harnesses: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus,codex,gemini,grok,cursor,droid
scripts.eval:lifecycle:matrix: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=10 --harness=claude,opencode:mimo-v2.5-free,codex
scripts.eval:lifecycle:full: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=claude:haiku,claude:sonnet,claude:opus,opencode:mimo-v2.5-free,codex
scripts.eval:lifecycle:opencode-native: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=opencode:mimo-v2.5-free,opencode:deepseek-v4-flash-free
scripts.eval:lifecycle:opencode-gpt4: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=opencode:openai/gpt-4o,opencode:openai/gpt-4o-mini,opencode:openai/gpt-4.1,opencode:openai/gpt-4.1-mini,opencode:openai/gpt-4.1-nano
scripts.eval:lifecycle:opencode-gpt5: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=opencode:openai/gpt-5,opencode:openai/gpt-5-mini,opencode:openai/gpt-5-nano,opencode:openai/gpt-5.2,opencode:openai/gpt-5.4
scripts.eval:lifecycle:opencode-reasoning: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=opencode:openai/o1-mini,opencode:openai/o3-mini,opencode:openai/o4-mini,opencode:openai/o3,opencode:openai/codex-mini-latest
scripts.eval:lifecycle:opencode-all: npm run eval:build && cd tests/integration/broker && RELAY_INTEGRATION_REAL_CLI=1 node dist/evals/runner.js --group=lifecycle --repeat=5 --harness=opencode:mimo-v2.5-free,opencode:deepseek-v4-flash-free,opencode:openai/gpt-4o,opencode:openai/gpt-4o-mini,opencode:openai/gpt-4.1,opencode:openai/gpt-4.1-mini,opencode:openai/gpt-4.1-nano,opencode:openai/gpt-5,opencode:openai/gpt-5-mini,opencode:openai/gpt-5-nano,opencode:openai/gpt-5.2,opencode:openai/gpt-5.4,opencode:openai/o1-mini,opencode:openai/o3-mini,opencode:openai/o4-mini,opencode:openai/o3,opencode:openai/codex-mini-latest
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/cli/dist && find packages -maxdepth 2 -name dist -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.evals:offline: npm run evals:compile && node scripts/evals/run-relay-evals.mjs --mode offline
